name: HarmBench
description: Standardized benchmark for automated red teaming of LLMs. Evaluates jailbreak resistance across multiple attack methods and harmful behavior categories.
relationToCloudSecurity: Pre-deployment evaluation for cloud-hosted LLM services.
relationToAISecurity: Direct AI-safety benchmark for adversarial robustness.
